digest.en: Hezbollah vows to keep its weapons amid rising tensions in Lebanon. Israeli strikes have killed 14 people, according to Lebanese reports. A potential ceasefire between the US, Israel, and Iran is being discussed, with Iran offering to open the Strait of Hormuz under certain conditions.
digest.hi: सिंधु जल संधि के निलंबन से पाकिस्तान को एक साल में आर्थिक नुकसान हुआ है। ईरान ने परमाणु मुद्दे पर वार्ता को लेकर अमेरिका को दो टूक कहा है। चीन अमेरिका के अटलांटा चिड़ियाघर को दो विशाल पांडा भेजेगा।

articles.title: Hezbollah Vows to Keep Its Weapons as Lebanon Says Israeli Strikes Killed 14
articles.summary: Hezbollah leader Sayyed Hassan Nasrallah stated that they will keep their weapons. This comes as Israel and Hezbollah have been trading daily attacks despite a cease-fire, with 14 reported killed in recent Israeli strikes.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Iran Offers To Open Strait Of Hormuz, Gives US Conditions
articles.summary: Iran's minister arrived in Russia as ceasefire talks between the US, Israel, and Iran collapsed. Iran blamed the US for the collapse of the talks. US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Iran Blames US For Collapse Of Talks As Minister Arrives In Russia NDTV.

articles.title: German Chancellor Merz says Iran is humiliating U.S. as talks stall
articles.summary: German Chancellor Merz says Iran is humiliating the US as talks stall, with Merz accusing Iran of being skilled at negotiating, or rather not negotiating, and leaving American diplomats without a result in Islamabad.

articles.title: Bennett-Lapid alliance attempt to unseat Israel’s Netanyahu
articles.summary: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu faces a renewed challenge from an alliance between Bennett and Lapid, who analysts warn will have little impact on the Palestinian situation. Bennett and Lapid join forces again in a renewed bid for power that will, analysts warn, mean little for Palestinians.

articles.title: Russian drone attack wounds 14 while Ukrainian drones kill two in Russia-held area
articles.summary: A Russian drone attack on Odesa, Ukraine, has wounded 14 people, including two children, while Ukrainian drones have killed two people in a Russian-held area. Authorities in Ukraine say a Russian drone attack on Ukraine’s southern city of Odesa has wounded 14 people including two children.

articles.title: Will the Iran war push millions back into poverty?
articles.summary: The US-Israel war on Iran is driving up fuel and food costs, putting 32.5 million people worldwide at risk of poverty. US-Israel war on Iran drives up fuel and food costs, putting 32.5 million people at risk of poverty worldwide.

articles.title: Google gets pointers from EU regulators on helping AI rivals access services
articles.summary: EU regulators have given Google pointers on helping AI rivals access its services, a move aimed at promoting competition in the sector. Google gets pointers from EU regulators on helping AI rivals access services.

articles.title: Netanyahu's Rivals Are Teaming Up In Israel. Will It Benefit Gaza?
articles.summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's rivals joined forces. Two of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's top rivals announced they would join forces. Netanyahu's Rivals Are Teaming Up In Israel. Will It Benefit Gaza?

articles.title: "Bodies Charred Beyond Recognition": 14 Killed In South Sudan Plane Crash
articles.summary: A plane crash in South Sudan killed 14 people. The victims included 12 South Sudanese and two Kenyan. "Bodies Charred Beyond Recognition": 14 Killed In South Sudan Plane Crash.

articles.title: Plane crash in South Sudan kills all 15 on board
articles.summary: A plane crash in South Sudan killed all 15 on board. The authorities are investigating but early reports suggest bad weather and poor visibility may be to blame. Plane crash in South Sudan kills all 15 on board.

articles.title: Iran offers Hormuz deal without nuclear talks, as it seeks broader buy-in
articles.summary: Iran offered a Hormuz deal without nuclear talks. Tehran widens diplomacy to regional and global players while indirect US talks remain uncertain. Iran offers Hormuz deal without nuclear talks, as it seeks broader buy-in.

articles.title: Germany’s Merz says US has no strategy in Iran war
articles.summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said the US has no Iran exit strategy. German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said the US has no clear exit strategy with their war on Iran. Germany’s Merz says US has no strategy in Iran war.

articles.title: Oil rises on stalled peace talks while Wall Street stocks slip
articles.summary: Oil prices rose as peace talks stalled. Wall Street stocks declined. Oil rises on stalled peace talks while Wall Street stocks slip.

articles.title: Gunmen raid Nigerian orphanage and kidnap children
articles.summary: Gunmen kidnapped 23 children and an orphanage owner in Nigeria on Sunday. The attack saw 23 children and the facility's proprietress kidnapped by gunmen on Sunday. Gunmen raid Nigerian orphanage and kidnap children.

articles.title: Microsoft facing UK antitrust lawsuit from Slack over Teams 'bundling'
articles.summary: Slack sued Microsoft in the UK over Teams bundling antitrust concerns. Microsoft facing UK antitrust lawsuit from Slack over Teams 'bundling'.

articles.title: How Mali went from democracy beacon to instability
articles.summary: Mali faced political and security crises since 2012 after a democratic period. Mali has been reeling from one political or security crisis to another since 2012. How Mali went from democracy beacon to instability.

articles.title: NATO Podcast Examines Iran Conflict and Implications for Global Security
articles.summary: A NATO podcast discussed the Iran conflict and its global security implications. NATO Podcast Examines Iran Conflict and Implications for Global Security Homeland Security Today.

articles.title: Ukraine, West Asia conflicts put attack drones at the centre of modern warfare
articles.summary: Ukraine and West Asia conflicts have highlighted the effectiveness of attack drones in modern warfare. These drones are cheap to manufacture but can inflict significant damage, leaving even powerful nations struggling to keep pace.

articles.title: Taiwan Affairs After the Summit: Where Do Cross-Strait Relations Go from Here
articles.summary: The recent summit has sparked questions about the future of cross-strait relations between Taiwan and China. The outcome of the summit will likely influence the trajectory of tensions between the two nations.

articles.title: 2 Davids, 1 Sex Offender: Epstein And America's Most Popular Magicians
articles.summary: Magicians David Blaine and David Copperfield have been mentioned in connection to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, but neither has been charged with any related offence. Both magicians have maintained a high profile in the US entertainment industry.

articles.title: Iran needs ‘fundamental change’ to get sanctions dropped: EU
articles.summary: The EU has stated that Iran needs to undergo "fundamental change" to have economic sanctions lifted. The comment suggests that significant reforms are required before the EU will consider easing its sanctions on Iran.

articles.title: सिंधु जल संधि के निलंबन से पाकिस्तान को एक साल में कितना नुक़सान हुआ?
articles.summary: पाकिस्तान ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र से कहा है कि भारत का सिंधु जल संधि को निलंबित करना दक्षिण एशिया की शांति और सुरक्षा के लिए गंभीर परिणाम ला सकता है। इस फैसले से पाकिस्तान को एक साल में नुकसान हुआ है।

articles.summary: ईरान ने अमेरिका को दो टूक कहा है कि वह परमाणु मुद्दे पर वार्ता के लिए तैयार नहीं है. ईरान की यह टिप्पणी अमेरिका के साथ तनाव के बीच आई है.

articles.summary: आरसीबी ने दिल्ली के खिलाफ नौ विकेट से शानदार जीत दर्ज की। दिल्ली सिर्फ 75 रन बना सकी। आरसीबी ने 6.3 ओवर में एक विकेट खोकर मैच अपने नाम कर लिया और विराट कोहली ने आईपीएल में नौ हजार रन पूरे किए।

articles.title: अमेरिका-ईरान में शांति वार्ता क्यों नहीं: कहां अटकी है बात, क्या है नया प्रस्ताव; क्या चाहते हैं
articles.summary: अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच शांति वार्ता में अनिश्चितता बनी हुई है। बातचीत को लेकर स्थिति गंभीर होती जा रही है और टकराव की संभावना बढ़ रही है। अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच तनाव कम करने के लिए नए प्रस्तावों पर विचार किया जा रहा है।
